heading: Commission; organization
label: 423b Commission; organization
text: The affairs of the Petersburg National Battlefield shall, subject to the supervision and direction of the Secretary of the Interior, be in charge of three commissioners, consisting of Army officers, civilians, or both, to be appointed by the Secretary of the Interior, one of whom shall be designated as chairman and another as secretary of the commission.
notes: Change of Name“Petersburg National Battlefield” substituted in text for “Petersburg National Military Park” pursuant to . See .Pub. L. 87–603section 423h–1 of this title
Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of administrative functions of park, see note set out under .section 423 of this title
